subject: New Assignment: Microservices Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the gaming sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Microservices Engineer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• Java
• AWS
• Kubernetes
• Redis

Details:
Client: NordPlay
Start: 2022-02-01
Duration: 6 months
Location: Malmö (remote)
Rate: up to 950 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Johan Bergström
Konsultchef
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 76 456 78 90
